startPoint.en: Talk to Dr Nabanik outside the Kharid-et Dig Site.
startPoint.es: Habla con Dr Nabanik en las afueras del Kharid-et Dig Site.

items.name: Ancient timepiece
items.display: Ancient timepiece (if Time Served is not completed)

items.name: Pontifex signet ring
items.display: Pontifex signet ring (can be on the tool belt)

items.name: Memory
items.display: 500 Divination memories, vibrant or better (collected after shadow engrammeter (depleted) has been obtained)

recommended.name: Ring of visibility
recommended.display: Ring of visibility or Sliske's gift (post-mystery completion for extra rewards)

recommended.name: 'Animate Dead' spell scroll
recommended.display: 'Animate Dead' spell scroll (alternatively players can use an 'Animate Dead' spell scroll (loaned) given by Dr Nabanik)

recommended.name: 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll
recommended.display: 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll (alternatively players can use an 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll (loaned) given by Dr Nabanik)

recommended.name: 'Incite Fear' spell scroll
recommended.display: 'Incite Fear' spell scroll (alternatively players can use an 'Incite Fear' spell scroll (loaned) given by Dr Nabanik)

recommended.name: 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll
recommended.display: 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll (alternatively players can use a 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll (loaned) given by Dr Nabanik)

postQuest.name: Ghost praetorian
postQuest.display: Two ghost praetorians may now be found by the smoke and shadow buttons. The ring of visibility must be equipped or Sliske's gift must be unlocked, and each of the shadow anchors must be activated. Speak to each of them to receive: 80 Ancient vis 80 Blood of Orcus 80 Samite silk 80 Zarosian insignias 80 Third Age iron 80 Vellum

text.en: Talk to Dr Nabanik near the bank chest at Kharid-et Dig Site. He will "loan" you any of the spell scrolls that you are unable to obtain.
text.es: Habla con Dr Nabanik cerca del cofre del banco en Kharid-et Dig Site. Él te "prestará" cualquiera de los pergaminos de hechizo que no puedas conseguir.

text.en: Pontifex signet ring, 'Incite Fear' spell scroll (or 'Incite Fear' spell scroll (loaned))
Head into the prison block section of the dig site.
text.es: Dirígete a la sección del bloque de prisión del yacimiento.

text.en: Enter the eastern door which leads to the solitary confinement area.
text.es: Entra por la puerta oriental que lleva a la zona de aislamiento.

text.en: If you haven't completed Time Served but you have the repaired artefact in your inventory, then just inspect the ancient mechanism to the North. Insert the artefact and then the eastern door will open.
text.es: Si no has completado Time Served pero tienes el artefacto reparado en tu inventario, simplemente inspecciona el mecanismo antiguo al Norte. Inserta el artefacto y entonces la puerta oriental se abrirá.

text.en: Go down to the southern end of the corridor, there will be an inactive dial on the west wall, just before the last empty room.
text.es: Ve hasta el extremo sur del pasillo, habrá un dial inactivo en la pared oeste, justo antes de la última sala vacía.

text.en: Cast an 'Incite Fear' spell scroll whilst standing next to the dial.
text.es: Lanza un pergamino de hechizo 'Incite Fear' mientras estás de pie junto al dial.

text.en: Press the ice button and enter the vault
text.es: Pulsa el botón de hielo y entra en la bóveda

text.en: Pick up the praetor's log page 1 and right click Transcribe.
text.es: Recoge la página 1 del registro del praetor y haz clic derecho en Transcribir.

steps.filename: The Vault of Shadows puzzle orientation and dial commands.png
steps.caption: The first puzzle grid

text.en: NE, E, NE', SW', S, S
text.es: NE, E, NE', SW', S, S

text.en: SE, SE, C, N'
text.es: SE, SE, C, N'

text.en: S', W, NW
text.es: S', W, NW

text.en: Pontifex signet ring, 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll (or 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll (loaned))
Head to the Main Fortress of the Kharid-et Dig Site (first room) and go to the south-east corner (the chapel).
text.es: Dirígete a la Fortaleza Principal de Kharid-et Dig Site (primera sala) y ve a la esquina sureste (la capilla).

text.en: Pass the Pontifex barrier and find the inactive dial on the northern wall, directly north of the Orcus altar.
text.es: Pasa la barrera Pontifex y encuentra el dial inactivo en la pared norte, justo al norte del altar de Orcus.

text.en: Cast a 'Exsanguinate' spell scroll whilst standing next to the dial.
text.es: Lanza un pergamino de hechizo 'Exsanguinate' mientras estás de pie junto al dial.

text.en: Press the Blood button and enter the vault
text.es: Pulsa el botón de sangre y entra en la bóveda

steps.filename: The Vault of Shadows - blood puzzle.png
steps.caption: Second puzzle grid

text.en: SW', C, NW, NW, SW'
text.es: SW', C, NW, NW, SW'

text.en: C', C', NE, SE, C'
text.es: C', C', NE, SE, C'

text.en: NE', NE', C', C', NE'
text.es: NE', NE', C', C', NE'

text.en: C', SW', SE, C, SE
text.es: C', SW', SE, C, SE

text.en: C, SE, SW, C, SW'
text.es: C, SE, SW, C, SW'

text.en: C, C
text.es: C, C

text.en: Pontifex signet ring, 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll (or 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll (loaned))
Return to the main fortress of the Kharid-et Dig Site and go directly north of the Pontifex barrier, by the oven.
text.es: Regresa a la fortaleza principal de Kharid-et Dig Site y ve directamente al norte de la barrera Pontifex, junto al horno.

text.en: Find the inactive dial on the wall immediately west of the oven.
text.es: Encuentra el dial inactivo en la pared inmediatamente al oeste del horno.

text.en: Cast a 'Smoke Cloud' spell scroll whilst standing next to the dial.
text.es: Lanza un pergamino de hechizo 'Smoke Cloud' mientras estás de pie junto al dial.

text.en: Press the smoke button and enter the vault
text.es: Pulsa el botón de humo y entra en la bóveda

steps.filename: The Vault of Shadows - smoke puzzle.png
steps.caption: Third puzzle grid

text.en: 5', 2, 7', 3, 3, 4' - Top row complete (all pink)
text.es: 5', 2, 7', 3, 3, 4' - Fila superior completa (toda rosa)

text.en: 3, 3, 8, 3, 3 - Second row complete (all red)
text.es: 3, 3, 8, 3, 3 - Segunda fila completa (toda roja)

text.en: 7', 4, 8, 4' - Puzzle complete
text.es: 7', 4, 8, 4' - Puzle completo

text.en: All eight Shadow anchors active, or Pylon active, 'Animate Dead' spell scroll (or 'Animate Dead' spell scroll (loaned))
Return to the Main Fortress of the Kharid-et Dig Site and enter the war room by clicking the praetorium war table (middle of the Main Fortress)
text.es: Regresa a la Fortaleza Principal de Kharid-et Dig Site y entra en la sala de guerra haciendo clic en la mesa de guerra del praetorium (en medio de la Fortaleza Principal)

text.en: Find the inactive dial on the western wall in the small western room.
text.es: Encuentra el dial inactivo en la pared oeste de la pequeña sala occidental.

text.en: Cast an 'Animate Dead' spell scroll whilst standing next to the dial.
text.es: Lanza un pergamino de hechizo 'Animate Dead' mientras estás de pie junto al dial.

text.en: Press the Shadow button and enter the vault
text.es: Pulsa el botón de sombra y entra en la bóveda

steps.filename: The Vault of Shadows - shadow puzzle.png
steps.caption: Fourth puzzle grid

text.en: Pick up the shadow engrammeter (depleted) from the centre of the vault.
text.es: Recoge el medidor de engramas de sombra (agotado) del centro de la bóveda.

text.en: Collect 500 divination memories (vibrant tier or higher). Recharge the Shadow engrammeter when you have an inventory full of memories to charge it. Enriched memories count as double.
text.es: Recolecta 500 recuerdos de Divinación (nivel radiante o superior). Recarga el medidor de engramas de sombra cuando tengas el inventario lleno de recuerdos para cargarlo. Los recuerdos enriquecidos cuentan como el doble.

text.en: Return to the centre of the vault via any of the dials and Operate the engrammeter.
text.es: Regresa al centro de la bóveda a través de cualquiera de los diales y Utiliza el medidor de engramas.

text.en: Take Trindine's memory to Dr Nabanik.
text.es: Lleva el recuerdo de Trindine a Dr Nabanik.

chatOptions: 3 I want to talk about mysteries.

text.en: You will receive the memory as a book, and be granted 25,000 Divination experience.
text.es: Recibirás el recuerdo en forma de libro, y se te concederán 25.000 puntos de experiencia de Divinación.

text.en: Return to the vault using any of the dials.
text.es: Regresa a la bóveda usando cualquiera de los diales.

text.en: Speak to Praetor Trindine in the centre. This will complete The Vault of Shadows mystery.
text.es: Habla con Praetor Trindine en el centro. Esto completará el misterio de The Vault of Shadows.

text.en: If the shadow anchors weren't activated, or Pylon isn't active, you will need to wear a ring of visibility or have the ability to permanently see the Shadow Realm.
text.es: Si los anclajes de sombra no se activaron, o el Pylon no está activo, necesitarás llevar un ring of visibility o tener la habilidad de ver permanentemente el Shadow Realm.

highlightTerms: ability to permanently see the Shadow Realm

text.en: Return to and speak to Dr Nabanik.
text.es: Regresa y habla con Dr Nabanik.

text.en: Speak to him again after the cutscene.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo después de la escena cinemática.
